title: Create group from Item {name} automatically in another Board
excerpt: For use in Project Automation - e.g. Once Status is set to Approve - Create New Group (using Group Template) named {Project Name} - in Risk Register Board.

posts.author: LauraPora (Laura Penny)
posts.cookedHtml: For use in Project Automation - e.g. Once Status is set to Approve - Create New Group (using Group Template) named {Project Name} - in Risk Register Board.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @LauraPora,

You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app for that.

posts.author: LauraPora (Laura Penny)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks - but is this a paid app? My organisation would like Monday.com to provide this feature without additional expense required.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Then I’d be prepare to wait a while. There is already a significant backlog of requests, some with much higher interest already.
